name: dokploy-dev
description: Dokploy self-hosted PaaS development plugin (aligned with Dokploy v0.29.x). Deploy applications, provision 6 database types (Postgres, MySQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, Redis, LibSQL), manage domains and Docker Compose stacks, AND debug failed deployments end-to-end with AI-powered log analysis (ai-analyzeLogs), Docker container introspection, Traefik diagnosis, and a guided recovery chain. Uses the official @dokploy/mcp server (500+ tools across 49 categories) plus 5 debugging-focused slash commands.
